anti_claims: This skill JSON seed does not flip source authority away from the current skill markdown projection.
Resolved operated-standard and acted-on-kind edges are structural route mappings, not proof the skill is complete or used correctly by agents.
Absent mechanism or concept neighbours are residual pressure, not evidence that no such neighbours exist.
Generated graph, health, and atlas projections cannot be read back as source evidence.

omitted: mechanism or concept neighbours not named by typed source mapping
omission_receipt.reason: Skill instance preserves public-safe markdown source identity, digest, and typed route mapping only. JSON parity does not prove full skill-body completeness or runtime correctness.

residual_pressure.reentry_condition: Bind skill.uses mechanism and skill.applies concept edges only when source evidence names ids.

justification.summary: This markdown maps runtime-organ instance refinement for the shared microcosm_runtime_organ triad to durable work-landing evidence because bounded organ corrections must be tied to source refs, fixtures, manifests, validator receipts, scoped commits, and explicit authority ceilings rather than status-board prose.

Skill source mapping names this concept as an applied doctrine boundary.
Skill source mapping names this mechanism as an operational dependency.

skill_payload.mapping_basis: This markdown maps runtime-organ instance refinement for the shared microcosm_runtime_organ triad to durable work-landing evidence because bounded organ corrections must be tied to source refs, fixtures, manifests, validator receipts, scoped commits, and explicit authority ceilings rather than status-board prose.

title: Microcosm Runtime Organ Refine Instance
triggers: A runtime organ has stale or weak source refs, fixture refs, mechanism refs, paper-module refs, validator refs, receipt refs, source-module manifest evidence, authority ceiling, or anti-claim language.

The correction can be sourced from copied non-secret source modules, focused validator receipts, exact-copy/source-module manifests, paper-module capsules, mechanism evidence, durable work-landing receipts, and generated lattice health without changing the class expectation.
workflow: Inspect the organ standard, organ atlas row, source-module manifest, fixture manifest, paper-module capsule, mechanism source, validator receipts, generated health, and landing receipts before mutation.
Change only fields that tighten source evidence, fixture binding, validator binding, receipt expectations, public/private boundary, authority ceiling, or anti-claim wording.
Regenerate the lattice and leave unsupported runtime correctness, theorem correctness, provider, release, private-equivalence, source-body, or projection-freshness claims as typed residual pressure.
